The '''Tibanna Hover Transport''' was a large, floating vehicle that saw use on the [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna gas]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], floating over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].<ref name="SEMP" />

{{Veh-stub}}
